title: Drop Keybinds
description: Simple client side mod that adds more keybinds for dropping items!
body:
**Adds an extra keybind for dropping entire stack, and dropping half the stack.**

**Default Keybinds:**\
**V** - Drop Entire Stack, Alternitive for Ctrl + Q\
**Y** - Drop Half Stack

**5x** Customizable Amount Keybinds
